acceptance.baseline: measured with pred_cam_t=None and a boolean gate_1b verdict possible
acceptance.target: fail-closed when raw_emit_source.status is not loaded and no camera_translation/pred_cam_t exists
no numeric gate_1b pass/fail verdict when pred_cam_t is missing
no numeric gate_1b world round-trip error values when pred_cam_t is missing
gate_1a keeps computing while gate_1b is blocked
<=5.0 mm; mesh-skeleton divergence keeps computing while gate_1b is blocked

changes: scripts/racketsport/gate_check_body_decode.py:44 added explicit gate_1b missing-pred_cam_t block and top-level measured_gate_1b_blocked status constants.
scripts/racketsport/gate_check_body_decode.py:333 marks the report measured_gate_1b_blocked and copies the gate_1b blocked reason to the top-level blocker when gate_1b lacks pred_cam_t.
scripts/racketsport/gate_check_body_decode.py:451 detects sampled frames with pred_cam_t=None and refuses to append numeric gate_1b errors for those frames.
scripts/racketsport/gate_check_body_decode.py:492 routes missing-pred_cam_t frame sets to a blocked gate_1b summary while leaving the existing nonblocked gate_1b threshold/statistic branch intact.
scripts/racketsport/gate_check_body_decode.py:581 emits status=blocked_missing_pred_cam_t, passed=null, worst error values=null, missing request IDs, and a blocked reason for gate_1b only.
scripts/racketsport/gate_check_body_decode.py:835 makes the CLI return exit 2 and print the blocker for measured_gate_1b_blocked reports.
tests/racketsport/test_gate_check_body_decode.py:194 adds the absent-index/no-camera-translation fail-closed fixture and asserts gate_1a plus mesh-skeleton divergence still compute.

Threshold/stat proof: GATE_1B_MAX_ABS_ERROR_MM and MESH_SKELETON_DIVERGENCE_P95_MM values were not edited; the existing nonblocked gate_1b and mesh-skeleton percentile/pass branches remain the same formulas, with only a new blocked branch that emits nulls.

full_suite.failure_notes: adversarial_proofs.py exited 0; pytest reported 19 passed, 6 skipped, 0 failed.

honest_issues: The real VM-only raw body_mesh monolith was not remeasured in this micro-round; this remains fixture/proof-level acceptance.
The unmodified verifier still captures a ground call with pred_cam_t=null for its legacy fallback probe, but the emitted report now marks gate_1b blocked with no numeric pass/fail verdict.
A live GPU rerun with the raw SAM3D chunk index is still required to produce the corrected numeric GATE-1b measurement.
